summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. No GitHub mutations, merges, closures, or fix PRs are planned. Security-sensitive refs are routed to central security handling; unrelated open PRs are kept open or marked for specific human review where the hydrated artifact shows maintainer/review judgment is required.

actions.reason: Maintainer review is explicitly required; no close, merge, or fix action is allowed in this plan job.
Independent narrow proxy bug PR; keep open for proof/review rather than close or merge.
SSRF policy/boundary work is outside ProjectClownfish backlog cleanup and must route to central OpenClaw security handling.
Maintainer-owned draft PR needs explicit maintainer decision; no inventory closeout is appropriate.
Independent provider/parser PR with outstanding change request; keep open, do not close as duplicate or low-signal.
Provider/security-boundary work is quarantined to central security handling for this workflow.
Active author follow-up after requested changes needs human/reviewer confirmation before any fixed-by or merge path.
Independent fix candidate with proof and review blockers; keep open rather than close or supersede.
Broad gateway/plugin boundary PR is security-sensitive and out of scope for ProjectClownfish mutation.
Independent feature PR with failing proof/Swift checks and unresolved review findings; keep open.
Linked security issue must be quarantined; it is evidence only for non-security PR inventory decisions.
Linked HTTP egress/SSRF boundary refactor must route to central security handling.

needs_human: #84525 needs maintainer review for the non-secret models.json apiKey marker/redaction contract before any merge path.
#85345 is a maintainer-owned draft PR and needs maintainer decision before it can leave draft or merge.
#84292 needs reviewer/maintainer confirmation that the author follow-up addressed the outstanding CHANGES_REQUESTED review.
